{{CargoRelic
|name=License of Hitman No.∞
|class_id=20990
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A lifetime of corporate wage-slaving conditioned him to punch in at 9 AM sharp for eternal snail-hunting.
|fame=30
|art=15
|fth=15
|civ=15
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail HP +33<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail ATK +3<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail RUSH +3<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 999/999
|ss2=Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail HP +66<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail DEF +6<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail RUSH +6<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 999/999
|ss3=Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail HP +99<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail DEF +9<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail RUSH +9<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 999/999
|ss4=Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail HP +99<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail DEF +9<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail RUSH +9<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 999/999
|ss7=Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail HP +99<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail ATK +9<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail DEF +9<br>Per 9 Hitmen intercepted, Snail RUSH +9<br>Hitmen Intercepted: 999/999<br> (Awakened)
}}
